title: DNA/RNA Extraction from Fresh-Frozen Tissue Using AllPrep Kit
author: Annika Fendler

steps.title: This protocol is for Sample
steps.instruction: This protocol is for Sample

steps.title: Transfer tissue in 350 µL, for...
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue in 350 µL, for up to 10 mg of tissue 600 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue RLT + ß-ME in 2 ml DNA LoBind tube.

steps.title: Add a 5mm bead to each...
steps.instruction: Add a 5mm bead to each tube and lyse tissue in TissueLyser for 00:02:00 @ 20 Hz TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation )

steps.title: Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,

steps.title: Turn tube rack and lyse tissue...
steps.instruction: Turn tube rack and lyse tissue for 00:02:00 @ 20 Hz

steps.title: Incubate 00:10:00 @ Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:10:00 @ Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,

steps.title: Add lysed product to DNA Mini Spin Column
steps.instruction: Add lysed product to DNA Mini Spin Column

steps.title: Add 50 µL, for up to...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 80 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue Proteinase K (not diluted), mix by pipetting

steps.title: Add 200 µL, for up to...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 350 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue EtOH abs., mix by inverting, spin down liquid

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, , repeat if any liquid remains on column

steps.title: Transfer column to a new collection...
steps.instruction: Transfer column to a new collection tube and store tube at 4 °C until DNA extraction

steps.title: Transfer flow-through to new 2 ml LoBind tube
steps.instruction: Transfer flow-through to new 2 ml LoBind tube

steps.title: Add 400 µL, for up to...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 750 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue EtOH abs. , mix by pipetting

steps.title: Add 700 µL to RNeasy spin...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL to RNeasy spin column and spin for 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: Repeat until all liquid passed through the column
steps.instruction: Repeat until all liquid passed through the column

steps.title: Add 500 µL RPE
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL RPE

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 80 µL DNase I working...
steps.instruction: Add 80 µL DNase I working solution directly onto the membrane and incubate 00:15:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Add 500 µL FRN
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL FRN

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and don't discard flow-through and place column in new collection tube

steps.title: Add flow-through again to column
steps.instruction: Add flow-through again to column

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 µL RPE
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL RPE

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 µL EtOH abs
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL EtOH abs

steps.title: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new collection tube

steps.title: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 1.5 ml collection tube

steps.title: Add 30 µL of RNase-free H 2 O
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL of RNase-free H 2 O

steps.title: Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,

steps.title: QC: Qubit Qubit RNA BR Assay...
steps.instruction: QC: Qubit Qubit RNA BR Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q10211 and tape station RNA ScreenTape and Reagents Agilent Technologies

steps.title: 350 µL AW1 auf DNA Mini Spin Column geben
steps.instruction: 350 µL AW1 auf DNA Mini Spin Column geben

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: 80 µL Proteinase K working solution directly onto membrane
steps.instruction: 80 µL Proteinase K working solution directly onto membrane

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 @ Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 @ Room temperature

steps.title: Add 350 µL AW1
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL AW1

steps.title: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 350 µL AW2
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL AW2

steps.title: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 2 ml collection tube

steps.title: Spin 00:01:00 @ max x g,...
steps.instruction: Spin 00:01:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 1.5 ml collection tube

steps.title: Add 50 µL EB buffer Qiagen...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL EB buffer Qiagen Catalog #19086 directly onto membrane

steps.title: Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,

steps.title: QC: Qubit DNA Qubit™ dsDNA BR...
steps.instruction: QC: Qubit DNA Qubit™ dsDNA BR Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q32853 and tape station Genomic DNA ScreenTape Agilent Technologies Catalog #5067-5365

steps.title: Upload results from Tapestation here
steps.instruction: Upload results from Tapestation here

steps.title: Upload Tapestation results as pdf here
steps.instruction: Upload Tapestation results as pdf here.

steps.title: From RNase-Free DNase Set Qiagen Catalog...
steps.instruction: From RNase-Free DNase Set Qiagen Catalog #79254 DNAse I working solution: 70 µL RDD + 10 µL DNase I working solution per sample

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Weigh tissue before start to decide for volume

steps.title: Enter a complete list of samples...
steps.instruction: Enter a complete list of samples used for each experiment below: SampleID Type (TURB, T1, T2) Optional: Weight (mg) Comment DNA (ng/ul) 1 List of tissue sample used in experiment

steps.title: Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit...
steps.instruction: Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit (50) Qiagen Catalog #80224 Proteinase K working solution for DNA isolation: 60 µL AW1 + 20 µL Proteinase K per sample

steps.title: Keep tubes with tissue on dry...
steps.instruction: Keep tubes with tissue on dry ice and make sure that they do not thaw during processing. Transfer the tissue piece into a 6-well plate or small petry dish placed on dry ice and cut an appropriate piece of tissue (ca. 10-30 mg) with a safety scalpel.

steps.title: Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit...
steps.instruction: Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit (50) Qiagen Catalog #80224 Add 10 µL ß-Mercaptoethanol (not included in kit) per 1 mL of RLT plus buffer
